raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad buhs tew to Ehdamus
uri/ kas no teem darrihts irr
fsch ta KUNGA nest / un
to pee ta Preestexa nest /
to buhs us to Altari lift.
Un tam Preestexam buhs
Ehdama- Uppura winna
ninnefchanas-Uppuri neent /
s to Altari eededfinaht / tas
veens Ugguns par faldu
arfchu tam KUNGAM.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet kas no ta Ehdama-
ra afleek/ peederr Aaroxam
inna Dehleem/ tas irr wee-
t swehta Swehtiba no ta
GA uggunim.
Ne weenam Ehdama-Up-
n/ ko tu gribbi tam KUN-
V uppureht/ buhs ar Rau-
ritam tapt/ jo no ne weena
a/ un no ne weena Med-
uhs jums to Ugguni tam
GAM eededfinaht.
Par Pirnajeem buhs
o tam KUNGAM uppu-
et us to Altari tam ne
ahkt par faldu Smarschu.
In wiffu tavu Ehdamu-
buhs tew ar Sahli fah-
u tawa Deewa Derribas
lai no tawa Ehdama-Up-
hst ne paleek: wiffu tavu
buhs tew ar Sahli up-
un ja tu tam KUNGAM
Ehdamu-Uppuri to pir-
ngfu gribb uppureht/tad
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tew buhs Etji pahr to
leet/ un Wihraku tur wirfu lift/
tas irr weens Ehdains-Uppurs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta buhs tam Preesteram
winna Peeminnefchanas-Uppuri
no winna fagruhfstahn Wahr-
pahm/ un no winna Etjes ar wif-
fu Wihraku fadedfinaht / tas irr
weens Ugguns tam KUNGAM.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta III. Nodalla.
Deetwa Likkumi par teem Pateikfchanas-Uppu-
teem no Wehrfcheem : 1. No jihkeem Loh-
peem/ Awim un Jehreem : 6/7. No Sta,
sahn : 12. Pehz tohp teem Juddceem peekoh,
dinahts/ka Tawkus un Affinis ne buhs ehst: 17.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N ja winna Uppurs
weens Pateikfchanas-
Uppurs irr /ja tas no
Wehrfcheem to uppure / jeb tas
irr Wehrfis/jeb Gohws/tad buhs
tam tahdus / kas bes Wainas/
preeffch ta KUNGA uppureht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tam buhs fawn Rohku
us fawa Uppura Galwu lift / un
to nokaut preekfch tahs Sa-eefcha-
nas Tefts Durwin / un Aaroxa
Dehleem teem Preestereem buhs
to Affini us to Altari apfahrt
hazziht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tam buhs no ta Pateik-
chanas-Uppura ta KUN-
GA Uggunim uppureht wif-
fus Tawkus / kas tahs Eekschas
aplabi / un wiffus Tawkus / kas
pee tahm Eekschahm irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad buhs winnam tahs
Bh z diwi
"
    }
  ],
